PowerShell($retries=0; while \($retries -lt 15\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Output "READY"; break } } catch {}; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; $retries++ }; if \($retries -ge 15\) { Write-Output "TIMEOUT" })
